summary: Tested Photographer Availability System (Phase 2) - All features working correctly. Backend APIs for notification subscriptions pass 15/15 tests. Frontend shows Check Availability button on photographer profiles, modal displays 3 service types (Live Active Shooting, On-Demand, Scheduled Booking) with correct status and Notify Me/Unsubscribe buttons. Feed shows Follow CTA for photographer posts.
seed_data_creation: Created test user test_iter194@example.com for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photographer Availability System is fully functional. Check Availability button appears on photographer profiles, modal shows 3 service types with correct availability status. Notify Me subscription works via POST /api/notifications/photographer-alerts. Feed shows Follow CTA for photographer posts (not Book). The original test user dpritzker0905@gmail.com has an unknown password - use test_iter194@example.com instead.

features_verified.profile_check_availability_button: PASS - Button visible on photographer profiles
features_verified.availability_modal_3_services: PASS - Shows Live Active Shooting, On-Demand, Scheduled Booking
features_verified.feed_follow_cta: PASS - Shows Follow button for non-followed photographer posts
features_verified.feed_view_profile_cta: PASS - Shows View Profile for followed photographer posts
features_verified.session_log_header: PASS - SessionLogHeader component displays session metadata
